scripts.diff:dev: export SERVICE_SHORT_NAME=lm && cdk diff --profile bobtail-sandbox --context env=development
scripts.diff:prod: export SERVICE_SHORT_NAME=lm && cdk diff --profile bobtail-20 --context env=production
scripts.deploy:dev: export SERVICE_SHORT_NAME=lm && cdk deploy --profile bobtail-sandbox --context env=development
scripts.deploy:prod: export SERVICE_SHORT_NAME=lm && cdk deploy --profile bobtail-20 --context env=production
